name: Real Estate Lead Generation - Full Automation
description: Receives leads from Facebook Lead Ads and LINE OA, sends auto-reply, logs to HubSpot CRM and Google Sheets, calculates lead score, then requires HUMAN APPROVAL before assigning to agent.

modules.notes: Replace YOUR_FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID and YOUR_FACEBOOK_LEAD_FORM_ID. Connect Facebook account in Make.com connections.
Normalizes Facebook lead form fields. Adjust field_name keys to match your actual form field names.

parameters.message:
สวัสดีครับ คุณ{{2.customerName}} 🏠

ขอบคุณที่สนใจอสังหาริมทรัพย์กับเรา!
ทีมงานจะติดต่อกลับภายใน 5 นาทีครับ

ระหว่างรอ สามารถดูโครงการของเราได้ที่:
👉 [LINK_TO_PROJECTS]

หรือ LINE: @[LINE_OA_ID]

modules.notes: Auto-reply to Facebook Messenger immediately. Update message template and links.
Logs new lead to Google Sheets. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID.
Creates contact in HubSpot CRM. Connect HubSpot in Make.com connections using Private App token.

transformer.leadScore: ={{min(100, (toNumber(2.budget) > 10000000 ? 30 : toNumber(2.budget) > 5000000 ? 25 : toNumber(2.budget) > 3000000 ? 20 : toNumber(2.budget) > 1500000 ? 15 : toNumber(2.budget) > 800000 ? 10 : 5) + (2.timeline == 'Within 1 Month' ? 30 : 2.timeline == '1-3 Months' ? 25 : 2.timeline == '3-6 Months' ? 15 : 10) + 8)}}
transformer.leadTemperature: ={{toNumber(leadScore) >= 80 ? '🔥 Hot' : toNumber(leadScore) >= 60 ? '🌡️ Warm' : toNumber(leadScore) >= 40 ? '❄️ Cool' : '🧊 Cold'}}

modules.notes: Calculates lead score based on budget, timeline, source, and engagement.
HUMAN APPROVAL GATE - notifies manager via LINE Notify. Replace YOUR_LINE_NOTIFY_TOKEN.

setupInstructions: 1. Replace YOUR_FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID with your Facebook Page ID
2. Replace YOUR_FACEBOOK_LEAD_FORM_ID with your Lead Form ID
3. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your Google Sheets ID
4. Replace YOUR_LINE_NOTIFY_TOKEN with your LINE Notify token
5. Update Facebook Messenger auto-reply template with your links
6. Connect all services in Make.com Connections
